'''Thaffe''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[drill instructor]]. He was once a suspect in a murder, but was cleared by [[Spurch Goa]], an investigator for [[Imperial Navy Intelligence]]. He became friends with Goa, and after retiring from the military the pair became [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Rangers]]. During that time he trained [[Dyyz Nataz]] in counter-terrorism procedures. The three were captured and [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] by [[Gank/Legends|Ganks]] loyal to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Thaffe sacrificed his life so his two friends could escape.
